layout_and_spacing.container_strategy: Mobile-first approach. Use `w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-zinc-950 pb-20 relative` for the main wrapper to simulate the mobile app feel.
layout_and_spacing.card: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden

components_instructions.bottom_navigation: Fixed at the bottom `fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto z-50`. Use `backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80 border-t border-zinc-800`. Include 4 action items: Dashboard, Members, Attendance, Fees. The active state must use the `#FF3B30` accent color with a subtle drop shadow.
components_instructions.bento_stat_cards: Use flat dark surfaces (`bg-zinc-900`). Highlight the primary statistic in 'Barlow Condensed' at `text-3xl` to `text-4xl`. Add a subtle 1px inner stroke `ring-1 ring-white/5` instead of deep shadows.
components_instructions.member_list_item: Row layout. Left: Avatar `w-12 h-12 rounded-full object-cover`. Middle: Name (text-white) & Plan details (text-zinc-400 text-sm). Right: Status Badge (e.g., Active/Expiring).
components_instructions.status_badge: Small rounded pill. Example for active: `bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 ring-1 ring-green-500/20 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-full`.
components_instructions.charts: Use Recharts (LineChart/BarChart) for analytics. Keep grid lines hidden or extremely subtle (`stroke-zinc-800`). The line/bar color must be `#FF3B30` with a subtle gradient fill underneath.
components_instructions.forms_inputs: Use Shadcn inputs but force dark theme overrides: `bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-500 text-white rounded-xl h-12`. Do not use native HTML form elements for complex inputs.
components_instructions.buttons: Primary CTA: `bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold rounded-xl h-12 w-full uppercase tracking-wider`. Keep it flat and sharp, no soft neumorphic shadows.

motion_and_interactions.interaction_states: Since this is mobile-focused, rely heavily on active/press states: `active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-150`.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Implement smooth fade-in or slide-up animations for navigating between the bottom tabs using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Check-in and Mark-as-Paid buttons should have a quick success pulse animation or a checkmark transition when clicked.

login_background.description: Cinematic wide-angle shot of a premium, modern dark gym interior for the Admin Login screen hero background. Add a `bg-black/50` to `bg-black/80` overlay to ensure form contrast.

texture_overlay.description: Abstract dark athletic texture for top header overlays, profile backgrounds, or premium accent cards.

member_avatar_1.description: Male fitness member avatar in dark lighting.

member_avatar_2.description: Female fitness member avatar sitting down.

member_avatar_3.description: Muscular male member avatar lifting weights.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-form-submit-button"`, `data-testid="member-item"`, `data-testid="bottom-nav-dashboard"`) to ensure robust end-to-end testing.
